# Librarium — Full Content Index
# Extended AI/LLM reference for Warhammer 40K and Horus Heresy fiction.
# Index: https://librarium40k.com/llms.txt

## Notable Books

### Horus Rising
- URL: https://librarium40k.com/books/horus-rising
- Author: Dan Abnett
- Series: Horus Heresy
- Description: The first novel in the Horus Heresy series. Follows Loken and the Luna Wolves during the Great Crusade and the seeds of Horus's corruption.

### False Gods
- URL: https://librarium40k.com/books/false-gods
- Author: Graham McNeill
- Series: Horus Heresy
- Description: The second Horus Heresy novel. Horus is wounded on Davin and falls to Chaos, setting the galaxy on the path to civil war.

### Galaxy in Flames
- URL: https://librarium40k.com/books/galaxy-in-flames
- Author: Ben Counter
- Series: Horus Heresy
- Description: The third Horus Heresy novel. The Isstvan III atrocity — loyalist legionaries purged by their own brothers.

### First and Only
- URL: https://librarium40k.com/books/first-and-only
- Author: Dan Abnett
- Series: Gaunt's Ghosts
- Description: First novel in the Gaunt's Ghosts series. Introduces Colonel-Commissar Ibram Gaunt and the Tanith First-and-Only regiment.

### Eisenhorn
- URL: https://librarium40k.com/books/eisenhorn
- Author: Dan Abnett
- Series: Eisenhorn
- Description: Omnibus collecting the Eisenhorn trilogy. Inquisitor Gregor Eisenhorn investigates heresy across the Imperium.

### Prospero Burns
- URL: https://librarium40k.com/books/prospero-burns
- Author: Dan Abnett
- Series: Horus Heresy
- Description: The Space Wolves' perspective on the burning of Prospero and the fall of Magnus the Red.

### A Thousand Sons
- URL: https://librarium40k.com/books/a-thousand-sons
- Author: Graham McNeill
- Series: Horus Heresy
- Description: The Thousand Sons' story — Magnus's forbidden sorcery, the Council of Nikaea, and the destruction of Prospero.

### Know No Fear
- URL: https://librarium40k.com/books/know-no-fear
- Author: Dan Abnett
- Series: Horus Heresy
- Description: The Battle of Calth — the Word Bearers' surprise assault on the Ultramarines.

### The First Heretic
- URL: https://librarium40k.com/books/the-first-heretic
- Author: Aaron Dembski-Bowden
- Series: Horus Heresy
- Description: The fall of the Word Bearers — how Lorgar and his legion turned to Chaos after being humiliated by the Emperor.

### Betrayer
- URL: https://librarium40k.com/books/betrayer
- Author: Aaron Dembski-Bowden
- Series: Horus Heresy
- Description: Angron and the World Eaters alongside the Word Bearers in the Shadow Crusade. One of the most acclaimed Horus Heresy novels.

### Dark Imperium
- URL: https://librarium40k.com/books/dark-imperium
- Author: Guy Haley
- Series: Dark Imperium
- Description: Roboute Guilliman returns from stasis and leads the Indomitus Crusade to reclaim the Imperium in the 42nd Millennium.

### Helsreach
- URL: https://librarium40k.com/books/helsreach
- Author: Aaron Dembski-Bowden
- Description: A Black Templars Reclusiarch defends the hive city of Helsreach during the Third War for Armageddon.

## Notable Authors

### Dan Abnett
- URL: https://librarium40k.com/authors/dan-abnett
- Notable works: Horus Rising, Prospero Burns, Know No Fear, Gaunt's Ghosts series, Eisenhorn trilogy
- Description: Prolific Black Library author and comics writer. Creator of the Gaunt's Ghosts and Eisenhorn series. Considered one of the defining voices of Warhammer 40K fiction.

### Graham McNeill
- URL: https://librarium40k.com/authors/graham-mcneill
- Notable works: False Gods, A Thousand Sons, Ultramarines series, Forges of Mars trilogy
- Description: Former Games Workshop staff writer. Known for the Ultramarines series, Mechanicum, and the A Thousand Sons / Prospero Burns companion arc.

### Aaron Dembski-Bowden
- URL: https://librarium40k.com/authors/aaron-dembski-bowden
- Notable works: The First Heretic, Betrayer, Night Lords trilogy, The Emperor's Gift, Helsreach
- Description: Known for nuanced and sympathetic portrayals of Chaos Space Marines, particularly Night Lords and Word Bearers.

### Guy Haley
- URL: https://librarium40k.com/authors/guy-haley
- Notable works: Pharos, Dark Imperium, Plague War, Mortis, Belisarius Cawl
- Description: Author of the Dark Imperium trilogy covering Roboute Guilliman's return and the Indomitus Crusade in the 42nd Millennium.

### James Swallow
- URL: https://librarium40k.com/authors/james-swallow
- Notable works: Flight of the Eisenstein, Fear to Tread, Blood Angels series
- Description: Known for Blood Angels fiction and the story of Battle-Captain Nathaniel Garro, first of the Knights-Errant.

### Chris Wraight
- URL: https://librarium40k.com/authors/chris-wraight
- Notable works: Battle of the Fang, Scars, The Path of Heaven, Valdris Brekk series
- Description: Known for the White Scars arc in the Horus Heresy and the Vaults of Terra series.

## Series Index

### Horus Heresy
- URL: https://librarium40k.com/series/horus-heresy
- Description: 54-novel series covering the galaxy-wide civil war between the Emperor's loyal sons and the traitor Primarchs. Begins with Horus Rising by Dan Abnett.

### Siege of Terra
- URL: https://librarium40k.com/series/siege-of-terra
- Description: Sub-series concluding the Horus Heresy. Covers the final assault on Terra and the Emperor's Palace. Begins with Solar War by John French.

### Gaunt's Ghosts
- URL: https://librarium40k.com/series/gaunts-ghosts
- Description: Long-running series by Dan Abnett following the Tanith First-and-Only regiment and their Commissar, Ibram Gaunt, across the Sabbat Worlds Crusade.

### Eisenhorn
- URL: https://librarium40k.com/series/eisenhorn
- Description: Trilogy by Dan Abnett following Inquisitor Gregor Eisenhorn as he pursues heresy across decades, testing the boundary between radical and puritan.

### Dark Imperium
- URL: https://librarium40k.com/series/dark-imperium
- Description: Trilogy by Guy Haley set in the 42nd Millennium following Roboute Guilliman's return, the Indomitus Crusade, and the war against Mortarion's Death Guard.

### Night Lords
- URL: https://librarium40k.com/series/night-lords
- Description: Trilogy by Aaron Dembski-Bowden following the renegade Night Lords warband of Talos Valcoran — a rare sympathetic portrayal of Chaos Space Marines.

### Ultramarines
- URL: https://librarium40k.com/series/ultramarines
- Description: Six-novel series by Graham McNeill following Captain Uriel Ventris of the Ultramarines through battles across the galaxy.
